Z,e,e+_-d-S
ASN.1 type classes for PKCS#12 files. Exports the following items:
 - CertBag()
 - CrlBag()
 - Pfx()
 - SafeBag()
 - SecretBag()
Other type classes are defined that help compose the types listed above.
